title: Hero
subTitle: Struggling to move on from a past love, a man plots to murder his former girlfriend. However, his plans go awry when he stumbles upon an unforeseen situation.

title: Bhroona
subTitle: Some of the villagers chance upon the temporary absence of a woman's husband and physically assault her, unbeknownst to the dire consequence that they would have to face.

title: Sidila Mari
subTitle: Ganganna and Ranga share a close, friendly bond with each other, but an accident between them causes Ranga to lose his life. Years later, Ranga's son seeks out Ganganna in order to exact revenge.

title: T W R Daivanveshane
subTitle: The host presents an extensive range of consumer products from various popular brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Halli Rambhe Belli Bombe
subTitle: In order to resolve her sister's marital problems, a young woman decides to marry her sister's brother-in-law. However, things take a turn when she marries him under the guise of a village belle.

title: Pedda Gedda
subTitle: A man with mental illness becomes the sole heir to a vast inheritance and relies on the support of his kind aunt. Meanwhile, his greedy and evil relatives plot his murder.

title: My Autograph
subTitle: To invite his friends to his wedding, Shankar returns to his village. Along the way, nostalgic memories of his childhood and the bonds he left behind resurface.

title: Veeran
subTitle: Kumaran, a teenage boy, gets struck by lightning and goes into a coma. He wakes up realising that he has superhuman abilities post the accident.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

title: Garuda Gamana Vrishabha Vahana
subTitle: In the coastal city of Mangaluru, best friends Shiva and Hari go on to become two of the most dreaded gangsters in the city. Can their long-standing friendship survive their greed and ego?

title: Grahana
subTitle: A Brahmin village head's son, Puttaswamy, takes the initiative to bury the corpse of a Dalit man who has died during the Hebbaramma Festival. As a result of this, he is exiled to live with the Dalits.

title: Ijjodu
subTitle: Anand, a journalist, travels to a village to study more about architecture. He meets Channi, a devadasi, and learns details about the secrets of her dark past.

title: Aaradhane
subTitle: Devotees from across the world sing, dance and take part in musical gigs performed by various artists to praise the Almighty.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Laddu
subTitle: A group of friends enjoys life in the countryside before moving to the city. Their life takes a chaotic turn when they encounter a girl and a priceless relic, leading to a race to secure both.

title: Mayura
subTitle: Mayura, a Brahmin boy, discovers his connections to the royal family. He then takes it upon himself to avenge the death of his father and works towards building his kingdom.

title: Nammoora Mandara Hoove
subTitle: Manoj, a film director, goes to a village to meet his friend Praveen. He falls head over heels in love with a girl, but his dreams shatter when he learns that she is Praveen's lover.

title: Sachein
subTitle: Sachein saves Shalini's father from a life-changing accident. However, pride keeps them from revealing their love, as their friendship faces challenges that test their hearts and egos.

title: Ek Love Ya
subTitle: After getting rejected by a girl, Amar, a law student, becomes resentful. Years into the future, he is arrested for a crime that eventually leads him to her.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Stunt Master
subTitle: Chaos erupts in a college when a student decides to end her life immediately after receiving the news of her lover's accidental death.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Ginni Helida Kathe
subTitle: Cab driver Gini and passenger Ammu forge an instant bond over life's quirks. Soon, their chat reveals an unexpected link in Gini's tale.

title: America America
subTitle: Childhood friends, Surya, Shashank and Bhoomi decide to focus on their career after graduating. Later, Shashank and Bhoomi get married but fate has different plans for them.

title: Bheema Theeradalli
subTitle: Chandappa, a dreaded dacoit, gets deceived by a corrupt politician, Shashikanth. But fate intervenes when the latter's sister ends up falling in love with Chandappa.

title: Kallara Santhe
subTitle: A young man who is let down by the system decides to commit suicide. When the news spreads to the media and the government, he undergoes a life-changing event.

title: Game Changer
subTitle: In the midst of a power struggle for the chief minister's post, an upstanding IPS officer enters the fray of politics to fight against its corrupt system.

title: Radhe Shyam
subTitle: Despite being a doctor with no inclination towards superstitious beliefs, Prerana places her love and faith in Aditya, a palmist whose predictions turn out to be too spot-on to be disregarded.
